title.en: The dragon god will be furious.

content.en:
The powerhouses of the Xulong Holy Land outside the Divine Realm were killed by Ye Tian, but the major Divine Cities in the Protoss Territory were still attacked by the powerhouses of the Divine Dragon Holy Land, but fortunately, the First Divine Lord and other Protoss Lords came out of the Divine Realm and could rescue the major Divine Cities of the Protoss.

As a result, the First Divine Lord led many Earth Venerable powerhouses to rescue all over the Protoss, and as time passed, one of the Earth Venerable powerhouses in the Xulong Holy Land fell and died.

As a holy land, the strength of the Xulong Holy Land is indeed very strong, but there are not many top-level Earth Venerables, and they still need to keep some strong people to guard the Xulong Holy Land, so they can only send a part of the Earth Venerables.

Now, the fall of the three ten-star Earth Venerables such as the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable is a result that the Xulong Holy Land never expected, and there is no way to change the plan at all.

Soon, the power of the Xulong Holy Land to attack the Protoss was almost wiped out, and only a small number of Xulong Holy Land Earth Venerables were left to escape in time.

And as the Holy Lord of the Xulong Holy Land, the Xulong God General will naturally know about it quickly.

......

"What, Earth-Splitting Spear Venerable, Silver Moon Sword Venerable, Phantom Demon Venerable, they're all dead?"

"What a bunch of rubbish!"

The dragon god will be furious.

In his opinion, there is only one Protoss who has just broken through to become a ten-star Earth Venerable, it is simply too weak, the three Ten Star Earth Venerables and multiple Nine Star Earth Venerables have made a move, and it is not easy to destroy the Protoss?

But now, the Xulong Holy Land has suffered heavy losses, and a large number of Earth Venerables have died, even if it is a holy land, it is difficult to bear such losses.

Originally, the Xulong Holy Land was not considered a top Holy Land among the many Holy Lands in the Cangyu Universe, but now that it has lost so many Earth Venerables, I am afraid it can only rank at the bottom of the Holy Land.

"Damn, I've lost so many Earth Venerables, I can only recruit another batch of Earth Venerables when I go back!"

The Asahi Dragon God General thought to himself.

In fact, what he really felt sorry for was not the fall of these Earth Venerables, originally he formed the Holy Land just for himself, and the Holy Land of the Cangyu Universe was formed by them, the ancient gods and generals such as the Twelve Universe Eras, just for transcendence.

They have been cultivating for a long time, they have exceeded a cosmic era, it is difficult to continue to improve, and they have almost fallen into a bottleneck, so they are all eager for luck, using the monstrous weather luck to break the shackles, and then using the rules of the eternal universe to break the bottleneck of strength, so as to get a trace of detachment from the underworld.

But now, the most critical step has failed!

There are so many holy places, and the Xulong Holy Land can win the first opportunity to exterminate the Protoss, which he paid a huge price for, but with the fall of the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable and others, the plan failed.

"No, I haven't failed yet, I'll immediately rush to the Protoss, destroy the high-level of the Protoss, and then mobilize the other Earth Venerables of the Xulong Holy Land to occupy the Protoss's Divine Realm, and then control the Protoss step by step, in that case, my plan will still be successful!"

As soon as he thought of this, the Rising Dragon God would no longer stare at the Lord of the Yuan Gu, but rushed to the Protoss as fast as he could.

Yuangu Palace.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sensed that the aura of the Xulong Divine General was gone, and immediately frowned.

"The Divine General of the Rising Dragon has left, could it be that the Divine Clan has been destroyed by the Divine Dragon Holy Land?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu guessed.

From the very beginning, he knew that the target of the Xulong Holy Land was the Protoss, after all, the actions of the Xulong Holy Land were so big, and the intelligence ability of the Yuangu Hall was not bad, plus the Xulong Divine General had been hiding in an area outside the Yuangu Palace, but a faint wisp of aura locked him, this intention was too obvious.

He is only a first-star early god general, although his strength has improved recently, but he is only close to the level of a mid-stage one-star god general.

But the Xu Dragon God will be a real one-star mid-stage god general, and he is not an opponent.

Even if he is desperate, he will be the most powerful dragon general, and the price is his fall.

Naturally, he would not go to the Xulong Divine General to fight hard, and the Xulong Divine General would not dare to kill him at the cost of heavy wounds, otherwise it would be easy to be picked up by other Holy Land Lords.

There is no peace between the Holy Land, and it is normal for them to fight each other.

The Lord of the Ancient immediately used a chess piece hidden in the territory of the Protoss, contacted the other party, and quickly obtained specific information.

"The Protoss has not been destroyed, but the people of the Xulong Holy Land have been almost killed?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was shocked.

He knew very well the strength of the Protoss, and that was it, after all, the thirteenth cosmic epoch of the Eternal Universe was only in the early and middle stages, and it had not yet grown up completely, and the Protoss was not Ye Tian, so naturally it was impossible for him to have too strong strength.

But now, the Protoss has won.

"That chess piece is not strong, and he doesn't know much information!"

The Lord of the Ancient used other intelligence forces, and soon learned the true truth.

"The Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws has gone to the Protoss, no wonder!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu suddenly realized.

In the universe, if there was anyone who knew Ye Tian's strength best, he might be one of them.

He knew very well that Ye Tian's strength had already reached the level of a god general, and he had also entered the inheritance land and source of the Qilin Palace, and now how much his strength had improved, he didn't dare to estimate.

But Ye Tian's strength is much more powerful than him, it is certain, with such a powerful god general level sitting in the god clan, those earth lords of the Xulong Holy Land are naturally not opponents.

"The Xulong God General is estimated to be going to the Protoss, maybe he will be able to compete with the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu thought.

Immediately, he left the Yuangu Palace, preparing to go to the Protoss to see the excitement, and by the way, to spy on the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Ye Tian.

Swish!

The Lord of the Yuan Gu constantly shuttled to the divine realm of the Protoss.

The God Realm is also the new headquarters of the God Clan, and the Xulong God will inevitably go to the God Realm.

--------

Outside the Divine Realm.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged in the void, cultivating while paying attention to the situation around him.

And the First Divine Lord and the others also returned here after solving the trouble.

They are all waiting!

The Protoss knew very well that the Rising Dragon God would not give up and would definitely come to the Protoss.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and said, "The Xu Dragon God is coming!"

"Are you coming?"

The First Divine Lord and the others scanned the surrounding area, but they found nothing.

Ye Tian didn't explain, although the Xulong Divine General was still far away from here, but it was indeed here, this was the result of his use of the Life Heavenly Pupil ability to detect, and the First Divine Lord and the others did not have the Life Heavenly Pupil, so naturally it was not clear.

It didn't take long for a supreme aura to pass in.

The expressions of the First Divine Lord and the others changed drastically, and that aura made them all feel hopeless.

There is no doubt that the person who came must be a terrifying existence above the Ten Star Earth Venerable - a god-level powerhouse!

"Protoss, damn it!"

A terrifying roar shook the void.

The next moment, a figure came out of the void crack, staring at the people of the Protoss with cold eyes, and immediately fixed on Ye Tian's body.

"God General!"

The Xulong Divine General was shocked, he saw that Ye Tian was extraordinary, and there was a sense in the darkness that Ye Tian was very strong, and he belonged to the god general-level powerhouse.

God will have a sense of God, and He will not judge wrongly.

At this moment, he finally understood why the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable and the others died, because there was more than one god general in the Eternal Universe, and there was also one god general here.

Intelligence is wrong!
